PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?group ?groupLabel(SUM(?salesAmount) AS ?totalSales) WHERE {
  ?group wdt:P31 wd:Q641066 ; rdfs:label ?groupLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?groupLabel) = 'en')
  ?album wdt:P50 ?group ; wdt:P2664 ?salesValue .
  ?salesValue wikibase:quantityValue ?salesAmount
}
GROUP BY ?group ?groupLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?totalSales)
LIMIT 1
